use_cases: Rotating hero section taglines with smooth word transitions
Displaying cycling labels or categories in product UIs
Creating animated text for marketing and landing pages
Dynamic word displays in portfolios and creative sites
Animated keyword highlighting in promotional banners
ai_summary: A lightweight React component that cycles through an array of words with smooth entrance and exit animations. Each word fades in from below and fades out upward at configurable intervals, making it ideal for hero sections, dynamic labels, and animated text displays. The component is unstyled by design, allowing full customization via className props.
